scope.note: single concern: CLI driver + tests + one adapter argv fix the gate surfaced

size.note: logically one WP; new CLI module + its tests

completeness.note: every new source file has tests; observed-done evidence captured

architecture.top: CLI reads session.state_machine.state.value directly (note: identical to public health().state; left as-is — Session is the documented honest-state surface)

security.note: no secrets/eval/shell=True; SULIS_SESSION_CLAUDE_ARGV is a documented test-only seam requiring pre-existing env control; no privilege escalation

quality.top: local 'import os' inside _run_demo (fixed inline: moved to module top)
